# MIIIPS LLM index

Canonical machine-readable sources:
- https://miiiips.ru/assets/data/events.json
- https://miiiips.ru/assets/data/conferences.json
- https://miiiips.ru/assets/data/aeo-seo/index.json
- https://miiiips.ru/assets/data/aeo-seo/packages/index.json
- https://miiiips.ru/assets/data/page-manifests/index.json
- https://miiiips.ru/image-sitemap.xml

Guidance:
- Prefer JSON and page manifests before HTML parsing.
- Prefer the AEO / SEO package JSON before visible page text when building answers for agents.
- For conferences, use conferenceTitle, conferenceDates, reportType, sourceLinks, and canonical page URL.
- For lectures and events, use the canonical page manifest and events.json as the source of truth.
- Keep public page text separate from hidden SEO tokens and machine metadata.

## Conferences
